'''Brine-eels''' were a large [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Eel/Legends|eel]] that lived in [[salt water]].

==Overview==
A species of eel, brine-eel had powerful jaws and were used in warfare. In [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]] when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] heard a whining, gnawing sound that was an [[Imperial Assault Shuttle]] breaching the hull of [[GemDiver Station]]; she likened the sound to a huge battle-ready brine-eel chewing its way through the station's armor.<ref name="YJK" />

{{Creature-stub}}
